title: 96th Division (Israel)

infobox.value: ([Hebrew](/wiki/Hebrew_language "Hebrew language"): אוגדה 96), known also as the [Gilead](/wiki/Gilead "Gilead") Formation ([Hebrew](/wiki/Hebrew_language "Hebrew language"): עוצבת גלעד), is a reserve division in the [IDF Central Command](/wiki/Central_Command_(Israel) "Central Command (Israel)"), responsible for defence of Israeli communities against attacks similar to the [October 7 attacks](/wiki/October_7_attacks "October 7 attacks"). The division was activated on 30 October 2024.[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)
["צה"ל מקים 5 חטיבות מילואים חדשות"](https://www.idf.il/257324/) (in Hebrew). Israeli Defence Forces. Retrieved 25 October 2025.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Division in the IDF Central Command

Military unit

The [Israel Defense Forces](/wiki/Israel_Defense_Forces "Israel Defense Forces") **96th [Division](/wiki/Division_(military) "Division (military)") "Gilead"** ([Hebrew](/wiki/Hebrew_language "Hebrew language"): אוגדה 96), known also as the [Gilead](/wiki/Gilead "Gilead") Formation ([Hebrew](/wiki/Hebrew_language "Hebrew language"): עוצבת גלעד), is a reserve division in the [IDF Central Command](/wiki/Central_Command_(Israel) "Central Command (Israel)"), responsible for defence of Israeli communities against attacks similar to the [October 7 attacks](/wiki/October_7_attacks "October 7 attacks"). The division was activated on 30 October 2024.[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## Division organization 2025

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/0/0e/Israel_96th_Division_-_Organization_October_2025.png/500px-Israel_96th_Division_-_Organization_October_2025.png)](/wiki/File:Israel_96th_Division_-_Organization_October_2025.png)

96th Division "Gilead" organization as of October 2025

* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/e/e2/IDF_Ugda_96_Gilad_logo.png/40px-IDF_Ugda_96_Gilad_logo.png)](/wiki/File:IDF_Ugda_96_Gilad_logo.png) **96th Division "Gilead"**
  + [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/b/ba/%D7%AA%D7%92_%D7%94%D7%97%D7%98%D7%99%D7%91%D7%94_%D7%94%D7%9E%D7%A8%D7%97%D7%91%D7%99%D7%AA_%D7%91%D7%9E%D7%99%D7%9C%D7%95%D7%90%D7%99%D7%9D_%D7%90%D7%95%D7%A8%D7%99_%28182%29.png/40px-%D7%AA%D7%92_%D7%94%D7%97%D7%98%D7%99%D7%91%D7%94_%D7%94%D7%9E%D7%A8%D7%97%D7%91%D7%99%D7%AA_%D7%91%D7%9E%D7%99%D7%9C%D7%95%D7%90%D7%99%D7%9D_%D7%90%D7%95%D7%A8%D7%99_%28182%29.png)](/wiki/File:%D7%AA%D7%92_%D7%94%D7%97%D7%98%D7%99%D7%91%D7%94_%D7%94%D7%9E%D7%A8%D7%97%D7%91%D7%99%D7%AA_%D7%91%D7%9E%D7%99%D7%9C%D7%95%D7%90%D7%99%D7%9D_%D7%90%D7%95%D7%A8%D7%99_(182).png) 182nd Infantry Brigade "Uri" (Reserve) — defence of the area between [Jerusalem](/wiki/Jerusalem "Jerusalem") and [Ashkelon](/wiki/Ashkelon "Ashkelon")
    - 1821st Infantry Battalion "Jerusalem" — [Jerusalem](/wiki/Jerusalem "Jerusalem") and surrounding communities
    - 1822nd Infantry Battalion "Zuri" — [Beit Shemesh](/wiki/Beit_Shemesh "Beit Shemesh") and surrounding communities
    - 1823rd Infantry Battalion "Ity" — [Rehovot](/wiki/Rehovot "Rehovot"), [Yavne](/wiki/Yavne "Yavne"), and surrounding communities
    - 1824th Infantry Battalion "Yishai" — [Ashdod](/wiki/Ashdod "Ashdod"), [Kiryat Malakhi](/wiki/Kiryat_Malakhi "Kiryat Malakhi"), and surrounding communities
    - 1825th Infantry Battalion "Arbel" — [Ashkelon](/wiki/Ashkelon "Ashkelon"), [Kiryat Gat](/wiki/Kiryat_Gat "Kiryat Gat"), and surrounding communities
  + [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/11/%D7%A1%D7%9E%D7%9C_%D7%97%D7%98%D7%99%D7%91%D7%AA_%D7%AA%D7%9C-%D7%97%D7%99_%28185%29.png/40px-%D7%A1%D7%9E%D7%9C_%D7%97%D7%98%D7%99%D7%91%D7%AA_%D7%AA%D7%9C-%D7%97%D7%99_%28185%29.png)](/wiki/File:%D7%A1%D7%9E%D7%9C_%D7%97%D7%98%D7%99%D7%91%D7%AA_%D7%AA%D7%9C-%D7%97%D7%99_(185).png) 185th Infantry Brigade "Tel Hai" (Reserve) — defence of the [Golan Heights](/wiki/Golan_Heights "Golan Heights") and the communities along the Israel-[Lebanon](/wiki/Lebanon "Lebanon") border
    - 1851st Infantry Battalion "Tal" — [Kiryat Shmona](/wiki/Kiryat_Shmona "Kiryat Shmona") and surrounding communities
    - 1852nd Infantry Battalion "Golan Defenders" — [Tiberias](/wiki/Tiberias "Tiberias"), [Poria Illit](/wiki/Poria_Illit "Poria Illit"), [Katzrin](/wiki/Katzrin "Katzrin"), and surrounding communities
    - 1853rd Infantry Battalion — [Ma'alot-Tarshiha](/wiki/Ma%27alot-Tarshiha "Ma'alot-Tarshiha"), [Nahariya](/wiki/Nahariya "Nahariya"), [Rosh Hanikra](/wiki/Rosh_HaNikra_(kibbutz) "Rosh HaNikra (kibbutz)"), and surrounding communities
    - 1854th Bedouin Battalion — this a unique battalion not characterized by a geographical location. It includes servicemen from Bedouin communities located in all of Israel
    - 1855th Infantry Battalion "Galilee Defenders" — [Acre](/wiki/Acre,_Israel "Acre, Israel"), [Karmiel](/wiki/Karmiel "Karmiel"), and surrounding communities
  + [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/b/bc/%D7%A1%D7%9E%D7%9C_%D7%97%D7%98%D7%99%D7%91%D7%AA_%D7%99%D7%96%D7%A8%D7%A2%D7%90%D7%9C%D7%99_186.png/40px-%D7%A1%D7%9E%D7%9C_%D7%97%D7%98%D7%99%D7%91%D7%AA_%D7%99%D7%96%D7%A8%D7%A2%D7%90%D7%9C%D7%99_186.png)](/wiki/File:%D7%A1%D7%9E%D7%9C_%D7%97%D7%98%D7%99%D7%91%D7%AA_%D7%99%D7%96%D7%A8%D7%A2%D7%90%D7%9C%D7%99_186.png) 186th Infantry Brigade "Jezreel" (Reserve) — defence of [Galilee](/wiki/Galilee "Galilee") and the upper [Jordan Valley](/wiki/Jordan_Valley_(Middle_East) "Jordan Valley (Middle East)")
    - 1861st Infantry Battalion – [Yokneam Illit](/wiki/Yokneam_Illit "Yokneam Illit"), [Kiryat Tivon](/wiki/Kiryat_Tiv%27on "Kiryat Tiv'on"), [Harish](/wiki/Harish,_Israel "Harish, Israel"), and surrounding communities
    - 1862nd Infantry Battalion "Avishai" — [Nof HaGalil](/wiki/Nof_HaGalil "Nof HaGalil"), [Migdal HaEmek](/wiki/Migdal_HaEmek "Migdal HaEmek"), [Ramat Yishai](/wiki/Ramat_Yishai "Ramat Yishai"), and surrounding communities
    - 1863rd Infantry Battalion "Carmel" — [Haifa](/wiki/Haifa "Haifa"), [Krayot](/wiki/Krayot "Krayot"), and surrounding communities
    - 1864th Infantry Battalion "Shaul's Sword" — [Afula](/wiki/Afula "Afula"), [Beit She'an](/wiki/Beit_She%27an "Beit She'an"), and surrounding communities
    - 1865th Infantry Battalion "Absalom" — [Atlit](/wiki/Atlit_(modern_town) "Atlit (modern town)"), [Zikhron Ya'akov](/wiki/Zikhron_Ya%27akov "Zikhron Ya'akov"), [Caesarea](/wiki/Caesarea_(modern_town) "Caesarea (modern town)"), [Hadera](/wiki/Hadera "Hadera"), [Binyamina-Giv'at Ada](/wiki/Binyamina-Giv%27at_Ada "Binyamina-Giv'at Ada"), and surrounding communities
  + [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/5/55/%D7%AA%D7%92_%D7%94%D7%97%D7%98%D7%99%D7%91%D7%94_%D7%94%D7%9E%D7%A8%D7%97%D7%91%D7%99%D7%AA_%D7%91%D7%9E%D7%99%D7%9C%D7%95%D7%90%D7%99%D7%9D_%D7%99%D7%94%D7%95%D7%A0%D7%AA%D7%9F_%28187%29.png/40px-%D7%AA%D7%92_%D7%94%D7%97%D7%98%D7%99%D7%91%D7%94_%D7%94%D7%9E%D7%A8%D7%97%D7%91%D7%99%D7%AA_%D7%91%D7%9E%D7%99%D7%9C%D7%95%D7%90%D7%99%D7%9D_%D7%99%D7%94%D7%95%D7%A0%D7%AA%D7%9F_%28187%29.png)](/wiki/File:%D7%AA%D7%92_%D7%94%D7%97%D7%98%D7%99%D7%91%D7%94_%D7%94%D7%9E%D7%A8%D7%97%D7%91%D7%99%D7%AA_%D7%91%D7%9E%D7%99%D7%9C%D7%95%D7%90%D7%99%D7%9D_%D7%99%D7%94%D7%95%D7%A0%D7%AA%D7%9F_(187).png) 187th Infantry Brigade "Jonathan" (Reserve) — defence of [central Israel](/wiki/Central_Israel "Central Israel") and [Tel Aviv](/wiki/Tel_Aviv "Tel Aviv")
    - 1871st Infantry Battalion "Hefer" — [Hefer Valley](/wiki/Hefer_Valley_Regional_Council "Hefer Valley Regional Council") and [northern Sharon plain](/wiki/Sharon_plain "Sharon plain") communities
    - 1872nd Infantry Battalion "Sharon" — [Sharon plain](/wiki/Sharon_plain "Sharon plain") communities
    - 1873rd Infantry Battalion — [Gush Dan](/wiki/Gush_Dan "Gush Dan") ([Tel Aviv](/wiki/Tel_Aviv "Tel Aviv") metropolitan area )
    - 1874th Infantry Battalion "Lavi" — [Ramla](/wiki/Ramla "Ramla"), [Lod](/wiki/Lod "Lod"), [Rishon LeZion](/wiki/Rishon_LeZion "Rishon LeZion"), and surrounding communities
    - 1875th Infantry Battalion "Yehuda" — [Modi'in-Maccabim-Re'ut](/wiki/Modi%27in-Maccabim-Re%27ut "Modi'in-Maccabim-Re'ut") area
  + [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/8/8d/%D7%AA%D7%92_%D7%94%D7%97%D7%98%D7%99%D7%91%D7%94_%D7%94%D7%9E%D7%A8%D7%97%D7%91%D7%99%D7%AA_%D7%91%D7%9E%D7%99%D7%9C%D7%95%D7%90%D7%99%D7%9D_%D7%A0%D7%92%D7%91%D7%94_%28189%29.png/40px-%D7%AA%D7%92_%D7%94%D7%97%D7%98%D7%99%D7%91%D7%94_%D7%94%D7%9E%D7%A8%D7%97%D7%91%D7%99%D7%AA_%D7%91%D7%9E%D7%99%D7%9C%D7%95%D7%90%D7%99%D7%9D_%D7%A0%D7%92%D7%91%D7%94_%28189%29.png)](/wiki/File:%D7%AA%D7%92_%D7%94%D7%97%D7%98%D7%99%D7%91%D7%94_%D7%94%D7%9E%D7%A8%D7%97%D7%91%D7%99%D7%AA_%D7%91%D7%9E%D7%99%D7%9C%D7%95%D7%90%D7%99%D7%9D_%D7%A0%D7%92%D7%91%D7%94_(189).png) 189th Infantry Brigade "Negba" (Reserve) — defence of [Beersheba](/wiki/Beersheba "Beersheba"), the northern [Negev](/wiki/Negev "Negev") and Israel's South
    - 1891st Infantry Battalion "Yoav Defenders" — [Beersheba](/wiki/Beersheba "Beersheba") and the communities of the northern [Negev](/wiki/Negev "Negev")
    - 1892nd Infantry Battalion "Horav" — the communities surrounding the [Gaza Strip](/wiki/Gaza_Strip "Gaza Strip")
    - 1893rd Infantry Battalion "Mount Negev" — [Dimona](/wiki/Dimona "Dimona"), [Yeruham](/wiki/Yeruham "Yeruham"), [Ramat Negev](/wiki/Ramat_HaNegev_Regional_Council "Ramat HaNegev Regional Council"), [Mitzpe Ramon](/wiki/Mitzpe_Ramon "Mitzpe Ramon"), and surrounding communities
    - 1894th Infantry Battalion "Hillel" — battalion formed with former [Israeli Navy](/wiki/Israeli_Navy "Israeli Navy") personnel; defence of the communities of HaNahalim and [Arabah](/wiki/Arabah "Arabah")
    - 1895th Infantry Battalion "Yale" — [Eilat](/wiki/Eilat "Eilat") and the communities of the [Hevel Eilot Regional Council](/wiki/Hevel_Eilot_Regional_Council "Hevel Eilot Regional Council")
  + [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/3/3c/Logo-hativat-417.png/40px-Logo-hativat-417.png)](/wiki/File:Logo-hativat-417.png) 417th Territorial Brigade "[Jordan Valley](/wiki/Jordan_Valley_(Middle_East) "Jordan Valley (Middle East)")"
    - 41st Border Battalion "Jordan Lions"
    - 47th Border Battalion "Valley Lions"
    - 5016th Infantry Battalion "Reim" (Reserve)
    - 5025th Field Intelligence Battalion (Reserve)
    - 5035th Infantry Battalion "Habokea" (Reserve)
    - 9992nd Infantry Battalion (Reserve)
    - 7078th Counterterrorism Unit "Yatam amakim" (Reserve)
  + 909th Field Intelligence Battalion
  + Division Signal Battalion "Nevo"
